## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Ally Hendrickson's background and potential fit for the Chief of Staff role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ally has a strong background in engineering, product management, and Chief of Staff roles, with experience scaling startups from 10 to 200 employees](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly, currently at $4M ARR with 30 clients, aiming for $50M ARR and $15K average monthly spend per client in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [The company needs support in various operational areas, including hiring, client operations, and finance management](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Marcel is interested in Ally continuing the application process, including completing video interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

## Topics

### Ally's Background and Experience

  - [Started as an engineer, transitioned to product management and program management roles](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [First Chief of Staff role at a 1000+ employee public company, focused on product and technology](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Moved to smaller startup (Routable) to build operations from ground up, scaling from 10 to 200 employees](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Currently in health tech, but looking for new opportunities aligned with personal values](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### fwd.digital's Current State and Growth

  - [30 clients, $4M in ARR, profitable with 70% margins](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Average deal size of $12K/month, mostly 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Strong pipeline with $4.7M in potential deals](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Goal to reach $50M ARR and $15K average monthly spend per client in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Organized into 5 pods, each managing 3-5 client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Operational Needs and Challenges

  - [Marcel currently handling multiple operational tasks (e.g., payroll, invoicing, account management)](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Need for support in hiring, client operations, and finance management](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Considering fundraising to accelerate growth and hire ahead of capacity](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Balancing profitability with strategic hires and organizational structure](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Hiring Process and Next Steps

  - [Ally to complete formal application and video interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Process includes application, video questions, and final interview](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Timeline: aiming to make a decision by end of January or first week of February](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ally to review and complete the application process, including video interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Marcel to send Ally the link for the video interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Both parties to continue the conversation and potentially schedule a final interview](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [fwd.digital to review Ally's application alongside other candidates in the process](https://fathom.video/share/TihHWkvHHrJtBBUb-izkwQUdqWKuwrfM?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
